primary_source: Whittaker, 1903. On the partial differential equations of mathematical physics. Math. Annalen 57:333-355. DOI: 10.1007/BF01444290.
title: QA Whittaker Rational Direction S^1 PASS [266] - canonical net at m=72
_fixture_purpose: PASS fixture at m=72 (m=24*3). |D_72|=3175; G_max=25633; Delta_max^+(72) bounded by 0.028 rad. W2 all-pairs validates 5,038,725 distinct pairs of cross-product integrality (~5M; pure integer arithmetic, fits in Python). Largest m in v1 scope. The factor 72 = 24 * 3 connects the applied mod-24 cycle to the 72-pair Cosmos count from cert architecture (CLAUDE.md core QA arch).
source_attribution: (Whittaker, 1903) On the partial differential equations of mathematical physics, Math. Annalen 57:333-355, DOI: 10.1007/BF01444290.
